channel.title: Insights and Conclusions
channel.description: Recent content on Insights and Conclusions

item.title: About me
item.description: I publish my research for book projects and anything that sparks my interest. I’m no longer actively involved in the business; I invest and have strong opinions. I’m married with four children, soon to be seven grandchildren. I wish for a solution-oriented world, but it currently seems to be more in a rollback or retro state.

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Welcome to research, insights and conclusions as part of my book projects
